name: Indian Army – Technical Entry Scheme (TES) 56 – 90 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Indian Army TES 56 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10+2 Technical Entry Scheme
basic_details.short_information: Indian Army TES 56 Recruitment 2026: 90 vacancies for 10+2 Technical Entry Scheme. Apply online from 13 May to 12 June 2026 at joinindianarmy.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Army, Directorate General of Recruiting, Integrated HQ, Ministry of Defence

age_limit.age_details: Group Testing Officer tests and Interview by Interviewing Officer. Only those clearing Stage I proceed to Stage II.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10: Rs. 56,100–1,77,500/- (on commissioning as Lieutenant); CTC approx. Rs. 17–18 Lakh per annum

selection_process: Application > Shortlisting > SSB > Medical > Merit List > Joining Letter
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official Indian Army Recruiting website www.joinindianarmy.nic.in by clicking the ‘online application’ button. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 13-05-2026 (1200 hrs) to 12-06-2026 (1200 hrs). Candidates must enter their particulars in the online application and read the terms and conditions before submitting the form.
